Amount - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random
Represents an amount of something, which can be a fixed number or a range.

I

Identifier - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
A solution to set plugin-name:tag=value PDC value for all versions even before 1.14, which is not supported by Bukkit API.
Identifier(String, Plugin, String) - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.Identifier
Creates an Identifier with the specified tag name and tag value.
Identifier(String, String) - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.Identifier
Creates an Identifier with the specified tag name and tag value.

isFixed() - Method in class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random.Amount
Checks if this Amount represents a fixed value (i.e., from and to are the same).
isFree() - Method in enum com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.PluginVersion
 
isInstance(Object) - Method in enum com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.setup.ILuckyRecipeItem.Type
 
isInternal() - Method in class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.LuckyBlockKey
Checks if this LuckyBlockKey represents an internal LuckyBlockType.
isItem(ItemStack) - Method in class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.Identifier
Checks if the given ItemStack has this Identifier applied by comparing the tag value in the item's NBT data with this Identifier's tag value.

LuckyBlock - Interface in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
Represents a Lucky Block, which can be placed in the world and interacted with by players.
LuckyBlockAPI - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api
 
LuckyBlockAPI() - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.LuckyBlockAPI
 
LuckyBlockBreakEvent - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.event
 
LuckyBlockBreakEvent(Block, Player, LuckyBlock) - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.event.LuckyBlockBreakEvent
 
LuckyBlockBreakEvent(Block, LuckyBlock) - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.event.LuckyBlockBreakEvent
 
LuckyBlockKey - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
Class representing a key of a LuckyBlock.
LuckyBlockKey(String, ColorData, Material, boolean) - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.LuckyBlockKey
Creates a new LuckyBlockKey with the provided parameters.
LuckyBlockKey.NotLoadedLuckyBlockKey - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
A subclass of LuckyBlockKey used to represent keys of LuckyBlocks that are not loaded in the engine.
LuckyBlockNotLoadedException - Exception in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.exception
 
LuckyBlockNotLoadedException(LuckyBlockKey) - Constructor for exception com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.exception.LuckyBlockNotLoadedException
 
LuckyBlockPlaceEvent - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.event
 
LuckyBlockPlaceEvent(BlockPlaceEvent, Block, Player, LuckyBlockKey) - Constructor for class com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.event.LuckyBlockPlaceEvent
 
LuckyBlockType - Enum in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
Represents the type of a lucky block, which determines its color and appearance.
LuckyCollection<T> - Interface in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model.random
Represents a collection of items that can be rolled with a certain chance.
LuckyDrop - Interface in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
Represents a drop that can be executed when a lucky block is broken.
LuckyDrop.Execution - Class in com.github.danirod12.luckyblock.api.model
Represents the context in which a lucky drop is executed.
